infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera is used for real-time hand gesture tracking — all processing is on-device.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone listens for the 'Open Bro' wake word to activate gesture control hands-free.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Speech recognition detects the 'Open Bro' wake word to activate gesture tracking.
